## Context/docs impact checklist

- [ ] I read the relevant repo context docs before making changes.
- [ ] This PR does not change repo status/readiness.
- [ ] This PR updates `docs/STATUS.md` because repo readiness changed.
- [ ] This PR does not introduce or change an architecture/product decision.
- [ ] This PR updates `docs/DECISIONS.md` because a decision changed or was added.
- [ ] This PR does not change architecture, module boundaries, dashboard flow, or integration flow.
- [ ] This PR updates `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` because architecture changed.
- [ ] This PR does not change testing commands, CI expectations, or validation strategy.
- [ ] This PR updates `docs/TESTING.md` because testing changed.
- [ ] This PR does not affect release/deploy readiness.
- [ ] This PR updates `docs/RELEASE_CHECKLIST.md` because release/deploy steps changed.
- [ ] This PR does not affect backend API contracts or assumptions.
- [ ] This PR updates relevant docs because backend API contract assumptions changed.
- [ ] This PR does not affect docs/context.
- [ ] This PR updates docs/context.
